name: Omniknight
description: I have gazed into the Omniscience, and it has gazed into me.

abilities.name: Degen Aura
abilities.description: Additionally applies an enemy unique incoming damage amplification on affected enemy units. This affects all enemy incoming damage sourced to Omniknight.

abilities.name: Healing Hammer
abilities.description: The All Seeing One converts all spell damage dealt into self heal per second.

abilities.name: Purification
abilities.description: Instantly heals a friendly unit and damages all nearby enemy units. Applies a secondary, less effective Purification instance after a short delay.

abilities.name: Repel
abilities.description: Grants debuff immunity to the targeted allied hero. The buff additionally grants bonus and health regeneration corresponding to the amount of current active debuffs on them.

abilities.name: Hammer of Purity
abilities.description: Grants bonus attack range while dealing additional pure spell damage corresponding to a portion of Omniknight's main attack damage for one attack.

abilities.name: Guardian Angel
abilities.description: Grants allied units within the area-targeted location physical damage immunity.
